instructions_to_main_agent.description: Remove the 'AUTONOMOUS BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE' orange pill/chip from the hero section.

instructions_to_main_agent.description: Place 'Autonomous Business Intelligence' text in the orange trust section (What Cognition Delivers header).
Reduce word density in Feature Cards and Architecture Section.

replacements.original: Connects to your accounting, CRM, email, and operations. Watches every signal 24/7.
replacements.new: Connects accounting, CRM, and ops. Watches 24/7.

replacements.original: Surfaces anomalies, cash flow risks, churn signals, and compliance gaps before they become problems.
replacements.new: Flags anomalies, cash flow risks, and compliance gaps early.

replacements.original: Recommends actions, drafts communications, and automates corrective workflows across your business.
replacements.new: Recommends actions, drafts comms, and automates workflows.

replacements.original: Daily intelligence briefs compiled from all your data sources. No dashboard digging required.
replacements.new: Daily intelligence briefs from all sources. No dashboard digging.

replacements.original: Data hosted in Australia. No offshore processing. Full audit trail. Enterprise-grade security.
replacements.new: Australian hosted. No offshore processing. Full audit trail.

replacements.original: Increase executive leverage, elevate team performance, and reduce burnout without expanding headcount.
replacements.new: Boost leverage and performance without expanding headcount.

replacements.original: One platform. Four pillars of intelligence.
Every screen built for decisions, not analysis.

instructions_to_main_agent.description: Tighten Hero Rotator Copy for reduced word density.
